title: eriodendron aesculifolium
intro: Eriodendron aesculifolium, also known as the Algodão-branco tree, is a species of flowering tree native to the tropical forests of South America. Traditionally, the bark and leaves of this tree have been used in medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eriodendron aesculifolium include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and protecting against certain infections. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
